purpose: Enforce production English adaptation locks, prevent source language/corrupted text, and guard against canon drift for project_001. Assumed mappings for required English names to original Chinese names are based on character roles and prominence in the merged extraction data, as adaptation_locks/names.md was not provided.

global_reject_patterns.description: Blocks all CJK Unified Ideographs (Chinese characters) from appearing in the adapted prose.
global_reject_patterns.message: Chinese characters are not permitted in the final adapted English prose.

global_reject_patterns.description: Blocks the Unicode replacement character, often indicative of mojibake or decoding errors.
global_reject_patterns.message: Unicode replacement character () indicates corrupted text and is not permitted.

global_reject_patterns.description: Blocks common non-printable ASCII control characters that can indicate corrupted text.
global_reject_patterns.message: Non-printable control characters indicate corrupted text and are not permitted.

global_reject_patterns.description: Blocks known placeholders from raw extraction data that indicate censored or unadapted source text.
global_reject_patterns.message: Raw extraction placeholders (e.g., pao, chuang, jian) are not permitted and indicate unadapted text.

forbidden_names: All legacy source names, pinyin names, Chinese-character names, mojibake variants, and obsolete adapted names are forbidden.

forbidden_name_patterns.description: Blocks specific pinyin/source names explicitly forbidden by project rules.
examples: All legacy source names, pinyin names, Chinese-character names, mojibake variants, and obsolete adapted names are forbidden.
forbidden_name_patterns.pattern: \b(?:legacy source/adaptation name|legacy source/adaptation name|legacy source/adaptation name|legacy source/adaptation name|legacy source/adaptation name|legacy source/adaptation name|legacy source/adaptation name|legacy source/adaptation name)\b
forbidden_name_patterns.message: Forbidden pinyin/source name detected. Use adapted English names only.

forbidden_name_patterns.description: All source-language names, Chinese-character names, mojibake variants, raw extraction aliases, and unapproved pinyin/source names are forbidden.
examples: All legacy source names, pinyin names, Chinese-character names, mojibake variants, and obsolete adapted names are forbidden.
forbidden_name_patterns.message: Traditional Chinese surname-shi format is not permitted. Use adapted English names.

forbidden_name_patterns.description: Blocks common Chinese honorifics/titles that should be adapted.
forbidden_name_patterns.message: Forbidden Chinese honorific or title detected. Use adapted English equivalents.

style_safety_guards.description: All source-language names, Chinese-character names, mojibake variants, raw extraction aliases, and unapproved pinyin/source names are forbidden.
style_safety_guards.message: Anachronistic modern slang or concepts detected. Ensure consistency with historical setting or adapt carefully.

style_safety_guards.description: Warns against the use of highly derogatory or culturally sensitive terms (e.g., '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '') without proper contextualization or adaptation for target audience.
style_safety_guards.message: Potentially offensive or culturally sensitive derogatory term detected. Review for appropriate adaptation and context.

style_safety_guards.description: Warns against overly explicit descriptions of violence (e.g., rape, infanticide, dismemberment, domestic abuse) or sexual content (e.g., non-consensual acts, graphic intimacy) that may exceed target audience guidelines or misrepresent character intent.
style_safety_guards.message: Explicit violence or sexual content detected. Review for target audience appropriateness and accurate portrayal of character intent.

style_safety_guards.description: Warns when Elara Willow's strong stance on monogamy clashes with traditional polygyny, ensuring her character's core trait is maintained without softening or forced acceptance.
style_safety_guards.message: Monogamy vs. polygyny conflict detected. Ensure Elara Willow's stance is accurately represented and not undermined.

style_safety_guards.description: Warns when Elara Willow's actions (e.g., ruthless revenge, disowning parents, framing) might be perceived as excessively cruel or unfilial by readers expecting traditional 'good protagonist' behavior, ensuring her 'not a shengmu' trait is clear.
style_safety_guards.message: Protagonist's actions may be perceived as unfilial or overly ruthless. Ensure character motivations and 'not a shengmu' trait are clear.
